entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oil and food crop that is globally second in cultivated area and production among annual oilseeds and plays a significant role in the economy of many countries.

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: An annual oilseed crop that ranks first globally in cultivated area and production.

entities.name: ANNUAL OILSEEDS
entities.description: A group of oil-producing crops that are harvested annually.

entities.name: CULTIVATED AREA
entities.description: The extent of land used for the cultivation of crops.

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total output or yield of a crop.

entities.name: ECONOMY
entities.description: The economic system of countries where groundnut cultivation is significant.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The global region that ranks first in the area and production of groundnut.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The global region that ranks second after Asia in the area and production of groundnut.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, associated with groundnut research.
